project.name: Lidar_nav2_ws
project.description: ROS 2 Humble workspace for 3D LiDAR autonomous navigation with Livox MID-360, LIO odometry, 3D point-cloud relocalization, and Nav2 for simulation and robot deployment. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
